'''''Confal''''' was a [[Muurian transport]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The ''Confal'' attempted to repair the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] ''[[Link]]'', but instead was destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' Collector's CD-ROM]]
